terms.name: Phishing
terms.description: Fraudulent attempt to steal credentials or data by impersonating a trusted entity.

terms.name: Malware
terms.description: Software designed to damage, disrupt, or gain unauthorized access to systems.

terms.name: Zero-Day
terms.description: An unknown vulnerability exploited before a patch is available.

terms.name: Ransomware
terms.description: Malware that encrypts files and demands payment for the decryption key.

terms.name: Firewall
terms.description: A control that filters inbound and outbound traffic against defined rules.

terms.name: Encryption
terms.description: Converting data into ciphertext so only authorized parties can read it.

terms.name: Brute Force
terms.description: Systematically trying combinations to crack passwords or keys.

terms.name: SQL Injection
terms.description: Injecting malicious SQL into inputs to manipulate a database.

terms.name: Social Engineering
terms.description: Manipulating people into revealing information or performing unsafe actions.

terms.name: DDoS
terms.description: Flooding a target with traffic from many sources to exhaust its resources.

terms.name: MFA
terms.description: Requiring two or more verification factors before granting access.

terms.name: Privilege Escalation
terms.description: Gaining higher access rights than originally granted on a system.

tools.name: Nmap
tools.description: Port scanning and network discovery utility for host and service mapping.

tools.name: Wireshark
tools.description: Protocol analyzer for capturing and inspecting live network traffic.

tools.name: Metasploit
tools.description: Framework for developing, testing, and executing exploit code.

tools.name: Burp Suite
tools.description: Platform for testing web application security and intercepting traffic.

tools.name: John the Ripper
tools.description: Fast password cracker supporting many hash and cipher formats.

tools.name: Aircrack-ng
tools.description: Suite for assessing Wi-Fi security and cracking WEP/WPA keys.

tools.name: Hydra
tools.description: Flexible online brute-force tool supporting many protocols.

tools.name: Nikto
tools.description: Web server scanner for dangerous files and misconfigurations.

tools.name: Snort
tools.description: Open-source intrusion detection and prevention system.

links.name: OWASP
links.purpose: Web application security knowledge base and Top 10.

links.name: Hack The Box
links.purpose: Hands-on penetration testing labs and challenges.

links.name: TryHackMe
links.purpose: Guided learning paths and interactive practice rooms.

links.name: MITRE ATT&CK
links.purpose: Knowledge base of adversary tactics and techniques.

links.name: The Hacker News
links.purpose: Daily security news and breach reporting.

links.name: VirusTotal
links.purpose: Analyze files and URLs against many antivirus engines.

links.name: Exploit-DB
links.purpose: Archive of public exploits and vulnerable software.
